CVE-2020-29394.title: A buffer overflow in the dlt_filter_load function in dlt_common.c ...
CVE-2020-29394.description: A buffer overflow in the dlt_filter_load function in dlt_common.c from dlt-daemon through 2.18.5 (GENIVI Diagnostic Log and Trace) allows arbitrary code execution because fscanf is misused (no limit on the number of characters to be read in the format argument).

CVE-2020-36244.title: The daemon in GENIVI diagnostic log and trace (DLT), is vulnerabl ...
CVE-2020-36244.description: The daemon in GENIVI diagnostic log and trace (DLT), is vulnerable to a heap-based buffer overflow that could allow an attacker to remotely execute arbitrary code on the DLT-Daemon (versions prior to 2.18.6).

CVE-2021-29507.title: GENIVI Diagnostic Log and Trace (DLT) provides a log and trace in ...
CVE-2021-29507.description: GENIVI Diagnostic Log and Trace (DLT) provides a log and trace interface. In versions of GENIVI DLT between 2.10.0 and 2.18.6, a configuration file containing the special characters could cause a vulnerable component to crash. All the applications which are using the configuration file could fail to generate their dlt logs in system. As of time of publication, no patch exists. As a workaround, one may check the integrity of information in configuration file manually.

CVE-2022-31291.title: An issue in dlt_config_file_parser.c of dlt-daemon v2.18.8 allows ...
CVE-2022-31291.description: An issue in dlt_config_file_parser.c of dlt-daemon v2.18.8 allows attackers to cause a double free via crafted TCP packets.

CVE-2022-39836.title: An issue was discovered in Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance (CO ...
CVE-2022-39836.description: An issue was discovered in Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance (COVESA) dlt-daemon through 2.18.8. Due to a faulty DLT file parser, a crafted DLT file that crashes the process can be created. This is due to missing validation checks. There is a heap-based buffer over-read of one byte.

CVE-2022-39837.title: An issue was discovered in Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance (CO ...
CVE-2022-39837.description: An issue was discovered in Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance (COVESA) dlt-daemon through 2.18.8. Due to a faulty DLT file parser, a crafted DLT file that crashes the process can be created. This is due to missing validation checks. There is a NULL pointer dereference,

CVE-2023-26257.title: An issue was discovered in the Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance ...
CVE-2023-26257.description: An issue was discovered in the Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance (COVESA; formerly GENIVI) dlt-daemon through 2.18.8. Dynamic memory is not released after it is allocated in dlt-control-common.c.

CVE-2023-36321.title: Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance (COVESA) up to v2.18.8 was dis ...
CVE-2023-36321.description: Connected Vehicle Systems Alliance (COVESA) up to v2.18.8 was discovered to contain a buffer overflow via the component /shared/dlt_common.c.
